news_items.headline: Oil futures face new pressure as the US and Iran trade threats to strike key infrastructure
news_items.description: Trump said the US would attack Iran's power plants if it didn't reopen the Strait of Hormuz in 48 hours. Iran responded on Sunday with is own threats.

news_items.headline: Where is Mojtaba Khamenei, Iran’s new Supreme Leader? Even the CIA and Mossad are unable to find him
news_items.description: Iran Supreme Leader: Both U.S. intelligence and Israeli officials are reportedly equally surprised as they are trying to gather accurate inputs about current whereabouts of Mojtaba Khamenei.

news_items.headline: Did Israel miscalculate Iranian military capabilities?
